THINKROOM AI
PROBLEMSOLUTIONHOW IT WORKSTECH
SIGNAL STATUS: CRITICAL

Communicate when
everything else
fails

When disasters take down networks, ThinkRoom AI keeps people connected using offline-first technology.

When disaster strikes, communication breaks

closeNO INTERNET ACCESS
signal_cellular_offNO MOBILE SIGNAL
help_centerNO WAY TO REACH HELP
dangerousCRITICAL INFORMATION GETS LOST

Stay connected, even offline

wifi_off

Send messages without internet

Your messages move through the mesh network even when the world goes dark.

share_reviews

Connect directly with nearby devices

Devices form an ad-hoc local network using Bluetooth and Wi-Fi Direct protocols.

save

Store data locally on your device

Encrypted local storage ensures your data persists even if power or signal is lost.

sync

Sync everything when network returns

As soon as one node finds a signal, the entire cluster updates the global status.

How it works

01

Open the app

The Progressive Web App works instantly without a traditional app store download during emergencies.

02

Connect with nearby users

Your device automatically searches for and bridges with other active nodes in the vicinity.

03

Send and receive messages

Encrypted packets are routed through the mesh network to their intended recipients.

04

Data syncs when internet is available

Automatic global uplink happens the moment any bridge to the internet is established.

Where it helps

Flood-affected areas
Earthquake zones
Cyclone emergencies
Remote regions

Built for extreme conditions

Powered by Progressive Web Apps, IndexedDB, and peer-to-peer communication, ThinkRoom AI is designed to work when traditional systems fail.

READY_SIGNAL

ThinkRoom AI
Resilience through connection
